text:
Created attachment 173393
security/py27-keyring-9.3.1.diff

Update security/py-keyring to 9.3.1 [1] and make add SECRET_SERVICE to the default options to match what they did on Linux.

[1] https://github.com/jaraco/keyring/blob/master/CHANGES.rst#931
